scripts.cli:start: cd apps/cli && bun run src/bin.ts start
scripts.cli:daemon: cd apps/cli && bun run src/bin.ts daemon
scripts.cli:web: cd apps/cli && bun run src/bin.ts web
scripts.smoke:release: bun run smoke:desktop-runtime && bun run smoke:cli-runtime
scripts.typecheck: bunx tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/client/tsconfig.json --noEmit && cd apps/web && bun run typecheck && cd ../daemon && bun run typecheck && cd ../cli && bun run typecheck && cd ../desktop && bun run typecheck
